meaning: n.(澳洲土著为庆祝部落胜利等于夜间举行的)歌舞会,狂欢会
examples: See kangaroos, wallabies and northern corroboree frogs and explore snow-gum woodlands, wetlands and wildflower-cloaked plains.
Watch out for the rare broad-tooth rat, northern corroboree frog and river blackfish in the sedge fens in the valleys and bogs on the peaks.
